title: Rustomjee Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rustomjee Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
